message:
feat(lab,bin): oracle decision/replay identity, semaphore fairness scenario, and expanded oracle test coverage

src/lab/oracle/determinism.rs:
- Include decision_seq and replay_hash in Worker trace event summary
  string, enabling the determinism oracle to distinguish events that
  differ only in their decision/replay identity
- Remove .. wildcard to make the match exhaustive
- Add worker_summary_distinguishes_decision_and_replay_identity test

src/lab/oracle/finalizer.rs:
- Expand finalizer oracle test coverage with edge cases: finalizer
  registered after region close, double-finalize detection, finalizer
  ordering verification

src/lab/oracle/loser_drain.rs:
- Add loser drain oracle tests: drain with zero losers, drain ordering
  determinism, drain after region cancellation

src/lab/oracle/region_tree.rs:
- Add region tree oracle tests: deep nesting invariant, sibling
  independence, re-creation after close

src/bin/asupersync.rs:
- Add semaphore_fairness differential scenario that creates a contended
  semaphore with structured-concurrency scoping and verifies FIFO
  acquisition order via an atomic counter
- Import Cx, Runtime, RuntimeBuilder, yield_now, Semaphore, AcquireError,
  Budget, Arc, AtomicUsize for the new scenario
- Register scenario in lab_differential_scenarios()

tests/http_e2e.rs:
- Update negotiate_encoding call sites for Option<&str> signature

tests/multi_protocol_e2e.rs:
- Update negotiate_encoding call sites for Option<&str> signature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
